proposal1.heroHeadline: Kids Industries is losing 3,000 hours a year on manual proposals. This is where it drains away.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manual proposal creation eats up your time. Our system generates them in just 47 seconds, tailored to family brands.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment spent on proposals is a direct loss to your bottom line.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Proposals
problems.description: Creating a proposal manually can take hours. Each hour spent is an hour not enhancing client relationships or closing new deals.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying team members to draft proposals drains resources. It's a costly process that could be streamlined.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean missed chances. Every day a proposal waits is a potential client choosing a competitor.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals risk inconsistency. This can confuse clients and weaken your family-focused brand.

problems.title: Errors and Revisions
problems.description: Manual processes lead to mistakes. Each error means more time fixing and less time strategizing for family brands.

problems.title: Stress on Team
problems.description: Proposal writing adds pressure to your team. It is time that could be used for strategic thinking and creative development.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing a system that replaces all those inefficiencies with speed and precision.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours of manual work. With this system, generate complete proposals in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs for proposal drafting. Our system slashes these costs by automating the process.

solutions.title: Seize More Opportunities
solutions.description: Delayed proposals cost opportunities. Instantly deliver proposals and capture client interest immediately.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal is perfectly aligned with your brand.

solutions.title: Error-Free Outputs
solutions.description: Manual errors are common and costly. Our system delivers flawless proposals every time.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Kids Industries's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Kids Industries around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Kids Industries.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Family Engagement with Kids Industries's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will enhance your brand's connection with families through strategic insights and creative execution. Our engagement plan is designed to boost brand loyalty and drive conversions.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to unmet needs in the family market.

problems.title: Low Family Engagement
problems.description: Every family that leaves without engaging is a missed opportunity. Acme Corp is losing potential lifetime customers by not connecting effectively with this segment.

problems.title: Ineffective Content Strategy
problems.description: Content that doesn't resonate means families are not staying on your site. This results in a 25% higher bounce rate compared to industry standards.

problems.title: Poor Brand Recognition
problems.description: Without strong brand recognition, families choose competitors. This leads to a 15% loss in market share annually.

problems.title: Lack of Audience Insights
problems.description: Not understanding family dynamics results in ineffective campaigns. Acme Corp sees a 30% lower conversion rate due to generic targeting.

problems.title: Subpar UX Design
problems.description: A confusing user experience drives families away. This costs Acme Corp 20% in potential online sales.

problems.title: Weak Emotional Connection
problems.description: Without a strong emotional connection, brand loyalty decreases. Acme Corp experiences a 10% decrease in repeat customers each year.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions will directly address these challenges and turn losses into growth.

solutions.title: Creative Design
solutions.description: We craft engaging and family-friendly designs that improve user experience and retention. This ensures families stay and explore your offerings.

solutions.title: Market Research
solutions.description: In-depth family market research provides insights to tailor your content strategy. This boosts engagement and conversion rates.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy
solutions.description: Developing a strong brand strategy elevates recognition and loyalty in the family market. This increases market share and customer retention.

solutions.title: Content Development
solutions.description: Creating resonant content strengthens emotional connections with families. This leads to higher engagement and repeat visits.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Kids Industries is uniquely positioned to transform Acme Corp's family brand.

whyUsCards.title: Award-Winning Agency
whyUsCards.description: We have a proven track record in enhancing family brands, recognized by industry awards.

whyUsCards.title: Global Perspective
whyUsCards.description: Our London base and international experience offer a broad view on family market trends.

whyUsCards.title: Family Market Specialists
whyUsCards.description: We specialize in connecting brands with family audiences through emotional and strategic insights.

whyUsCards.title: Research-Driven
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by thorough research, ensuring campaigns resonate with family audiences.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to your brand's success.

team.name: Gary Pope
team.bio: Gary leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring each project aligns with our client’s goals and delivers results.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: Understanding your brand and market landscape.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Crafting a tailored strategy for family engagement.

process.title: Creative Execution
process.description: Bringing the strategy to life with engaging design and content.

process.title: Launch & Optimize

proposal2.pricingIntro: Explore our investment options to transform your brand.

pricing.name: Essential Partnership
pricing.description: Ideal for small-scale projects or initial engagements.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's have a chat about how we can elevate your brand. No strings attached.

lead.company_description:
We make family targeted brands stronger by delivering award winning insight, strategy and content. We work across multiple disciplines and in multiple industries. We've got researchers, marketers, designers, strategists, geeks and psychologists. We've built new websites, award winning hotels for the family, developed new TV stations, created new cereals, launched new products and researched just about everything under the sun.

Unique? We think so. There is no other company in the world that offers our level of family understanding coupled with the ability to turn this into effective strategy and implementation.

We'd love to hear from you at hello@kidsindustries.com or give us a ring on 0203 432 8574
lead.headline: Co-founder, Kids Industries | License Global's Influencer Of 2022 | Children's Ambassador Poc | Family Market Expert | Everything I Post Is By Me. Always.
